node.html:
• Developing an Explainable Predictive Maintenance (PdM) prototype using legacy shipboard data to deliver transparent maintenance decisions for marine auxiliary systems.
  • Engineering interpretable AI models (GAM, EBM) that integrate explainability metrics directly into operator workflows for verifiable insights.
  • Designing a decision-support dashboard to visualize health indices, anomaly indicators, and Remaining Useful Life (RUL) during vessel field trials.

• Performed 3D thermo-mechanical simulations to evaluate structural integrity and thermal behavior of EUV lithography systems.
  • Developed steady-state and transient thermal models using ANSYS, achieving 20% faster solver convergence.
  • Designed and optimized cooling circuits to improve thermal management, yielding a 16% increase in thermal efficiency.
  • Applied Model Order Reduction (MOR) techniques to reduce matrix size by 96% while maintaining a numerical accuracy of 10^-8.
  • Developed MATLAB-based automation tools to optimize encoder testing, reducing processing time by 40%.
  • Authored VBA automation scripts saving 15+ hours/month and reducing human errors by 90%.

• Developed an automated strength verification framework for Electronic Power Steering bolts using ABAQUS and Python, reducing analysis time by 90%.
  • Implemented VDI 2230-compliant joint analysis with <0.5% deviation from physical tests through Python-based automation.
  • Built custom ABAQUS plugins and parametric bolt models enabling standardized and repeatable joint analysis.
  • Achieved 3x faster design iterations by eliminating manual Excel-based workflows.
  • Enhanced computational efficiency by 40% while improving result reliability through experimental validation.

• Performed advanced ANSYS simulations on FRP and hybrid materials, achieving higher accuracy in stress predictions and a 25% thermal stress reduction through design optimization.
  • Engineered crack detection and prediction workflows using ImageJ and Python-based machine learning algorithms, achieving over 80% prediction accuracy.
  • Created VBA-based automation tools reducing data processing time by 50% across research team workflows.
  • Programmed 3 custom UMAT subroutines for ABAQUS enabling advanced nonlinear material analysis of potting materials.
